title: Chanklouder
description: Chanklouder is a reliable plugin that lets players keep chunks loaded so their contraptions run 24/7. Manage loaders through a convenient GUI, with support for economy, regions, and multiple languages.
body:
Chanklouder is the perfect plugin for those who want their world to never stand still. It allows players to buy and place special blocks that permanently force-load chunks, even when no one is around. With a reliable database, full integration with Vault for economy and WorldGuard for region protection, this is a solution your players will love.

Key Features:

Reliability: All chunk loader data is stored in a database, ensuring data is safe and secure through server restarts.

Ease of Use: Players can manage their chunk loaders through an intuitive GUI menu.

Flexibility: Customize the price and other parameters in the config.yml file.

Multilingual Support: The plugin supports multiple languages (Russian, English, German, French, Spanish, Chinese), configurable in the plugin's configuration file.
